svg.style: transition: none !important; animation-duration: 0s !important; animation-delay: -0.0001s; animation-play-state: paused; fill: rgb(110, 193, 228); height: 134px; transition-property: none; visibility: visible; width: auto

path.style: transition: none !important; animation-duration: 0s !important; animation-delay: -0.0001s; animation-play-state: paused; fill: rgb(110, 193, 228); stroke: rgb(224, 226, 227); transform-origin: 0px 0px; transition-property: none; visibility: visible

rect.style: transition: none !important; animation-duration: 0s !important; animation-delay: -0.0001s; animation-play-state: paused; fill: rgb(255, 205, 186); transform-origin: 0px 0px; transition-property: none; visibility: visible
